title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 27 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 1.91%.the main contract closed 848.5. some traders were negative to sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 889-890 yuan/mt; decreased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
